subcodes.first_line: O celestial Masoud! Let not thy heart be troubled by the vicissitudes of this fleeting world and the ever-changing conditions of corporeal affairs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مسعود ملکوتی از تلون این دنیای فانی و تغیر احوال امور جسمانی خاطر مگدر
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for nearness to God, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness
